title: MANGA NGE Did anyone get a t on Misatos nose in volume
display_title: MANGA NGE Did anyone get a t on Misatos nose in volume
wikitext:
[]: [NGE] Did anyone get a t on Misato's nose in volume 9?             Quote Post by Evangelion Oi! » Thu Oct 19, 2006 1:25 am in my Vol 9 in one of the first pages mistato has a lower case "t" on her nose did anyone else get that?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Oct 19, 2006 7:28 am Mine has it. I compared it to my Japanese version. The Japanese version doesn't have it.

[]: Typo             Quote Post by Evangelion Oi! » Thu Oct 19, 2006 9:44 pm Must be a typo then... SADAMOTO is god though... I think...

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Fri Oct 20, 2006 12:11 am i just noticed it, page 15...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Oct 20, 2006 12:11 am Evangelion Oi! wrote: SADAMOTO is god though...

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Fri Oct 20, 2006 1:20 am Reichu wrote: ...The only thing that can subvert Anno's power is the mysterious force known as "Moyoco"...

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelion Oi! » Sat Oct 21, 2006 9:15 pm Reichu wrote: Evangelion Oi! wrote: SADAMOTO is god though...

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Sat Oct 21, 2006 11:00 pm The white Eva-01 was drawn by Ikuto Yamashita... the same guy who made the final designs. Anno was apparently involved in the design process though, even if Yamashita was the one doing the actual drawing. Sadamoto designed the Lilim characters, he didn't have anything to do with the Evas as far as I know. I know Yoshito Asari designed three of the Angels, not sure who did the rest.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Oct 22, 2006 8:59 am There are a few images of a "white EVA-01", and Anno drew most of them. Are you thinking of this one? Apparently, that's EVA-00. :?

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelion Oi! » Sun Oct 22, 2006 1:59 pm Reichu wrote: There are a few images of a "white EVA-01", and Anno drew most of them. Are you thinking of this one? Apparently, that's EVA-00. :?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Oct 22, 2006 10:40 pm Evangelion Oi! wrote: ah...So Anno drew that one?

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelion Oi! » Sun Oct 22, 2006 11:46 pm Reichu wrote: Evangelion Oi! wrote: ah...So Anno drew that one?

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Sun Oct 22, 2006 11:51 pm Anno directed, wrote it, storyboarded it, did background voices (I think), did some of the mech designs (if I remember correctly), and most likely drew the entire last episode by himself withing a week. Or at least did the keyframes for some eps. Am I missng something (that is most likely obvious?)

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Oct 22, 2006 11:52 pm http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/encyclopedia/people.php?id=15

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Sun Oct 22, 2006 11:55 pm Hmmm... I don't know where I got background voices from... I dunno though, I still think he did some of the keys as well, it just makes sense to me, especially when they started running out of time, but meh, who knows. (Other than the Eva crew?)

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Oct 23, 2006 12:01 am cat42 wrote: Hmmm... I don't know where I got background voices from... I dunno though, I still think he did some of the keys as well, it just makes sense to me, especially when they started running out of time, but meh, who knows. (Other than the Eva crew?)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Oct 23, 2006 12:26 am Evangelion Oi! wrote: Wow, you sure do know a lot about paint. Do you paint?

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Mon Oct 23, 2006 12:55 am Do we know who did the marker drawings in Ep 26? Some where, deep in my heart, my romanticization (that's not a word, is it?) of the production of the series has him drawing those. But then again, that might fall under Story boards, so, meh.
